content.en:
Time flies.

Another long period of the final era has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Extreme Day Ultimate Rule finally broke through to the second realm, and it could be regarded as a small improvement in the Extreme Day Ultimate Path.

The most important thing is that he used some of the ultimate aura and chance of the Polar Day Land to forcibly comprehend the Darkest Ultimate Rule.

The Polar Day and the Darkness themselves are two opposing ultimate rules, and they can also learn from each other, leading him to successfully comprehend the Darkest Ultimate Rule.

At this point, on the Darkest Ultimate Realm, he has also successfully stepped into the main level of the Ancient Ultimate Realm, and his strength has also skyrocketed.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian's true body was copied and expelled from the Land of Extreme Daylight.

He was not surprised by this.

After all, his true body copy body is interconnected, and if he comprehends other ultimate rules, it will be difficult to hide, and he will naturally be discovered by the Polar Dayland, thus being expelled.

However, the copy body of the Polar Sun Spirit will not be expelled, which itself is a creature of the Polar Dayland, and it is a special existence.

Therefore, Ye Tian could still rely on the Polar Sun Spirit to copy his body and continue to comprehend the ultimate rules of the Polar Sun in the Land of the Ultimate Polar Day.

"The White Ghost Extreme Venerable is not there?"

He was ready to annihilate his replica body in an instant, but since the other party was not there, he asked the Aurora Spirit to throw out those Aurora Gold and some other resources, and then he quickly left with these resources.

......

Taiyi City can't go, and it would be strange if he went back.

After all, the other high-level Ultimate Realm Masters were all dead, and he was the only one who went back alive, and even broke through to become an Ancient Ultimate Realm Master.

When the time comes, not only will the White Ghost Extreme Venerable come to him, but there will even be other Ancient Ultimate Realm Lords and even Ancient Ultimate Realm Masters who covet his chance.

Therefore, he still stayed away from Taiyi City.

In fact, he didn't have much sense of existence in Taiyi City, and the high-level Ultimate Realm Masters who intersected with him were all dead, and when he went elsewhere, no one would care about an Ultimate Realm Lord like him.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian kept shuttling, wanting to stay away from the territory of Taiyi City.

After a long time, he came to another place.

Linggu Capital.

This is a relatively powerful place, much more powerful than Taiyi City, where there are not only countless high-level Ultimate Realm Lords, but even many Ancient Ultimate Realm Masters, as well as more than one Eternal Realm Lord.

The reason why there are so many strong people gathered here is mainly because the Linggu Capital is the origin place of an Ultimate Extreme Venerable, and that person has been cultivating and breaking through here, and finally achieved the Ultimate Extreme Venerable here.

It's just that after breaking through to the ultimate supreme, that one left here, but there are still countless strong people here, who have settled here.

Even if that Ultimate Extreme Venerable is not there, no strong person will dare to destroy this place, otherwise it will be invisibly offending that Ultimate Supreme Venerable.

With this level of relationship, the Spirit Ancient Capital is undoubtedly an extremely safe place, which is also the reason why many Ultimate Realm Lords are attracted here.

Ye Tian also heard about the situation here, and was ready to come to the Linggu Capital and spend a period of time here.

The Spirit Ancient Capital is a place that countless Ultimate Realm Lords want to come to, but if they want to settle here, they need to pay a certain price, that is, they have to pay some ultimate crystals.

If you don't have the ultimate hedron to pay for the settlement, you will be expelled.

This is also to prevent countless weak Ultimate Realm Lords from pouring into here, and the Spirit Ancient Capital simply can't accommodate so many Ultimate Realm Lords.

Of course, there are also some high-level people who want to earn this ultimate hedron.

However, if the Ancient Ultimate Realm Lord settles down, he will not receive the Ultimate Crystal.

The strength of the ancient level is second only to the eternal level, and the number of the ancient level is still rare, which is second only to the combat power of the ultimate supreme.

Relatively speaking, the ancient level has the potential to break through to the eternal level, and they are all extremely powerful existences, and the Linggu Capital also wants to recruit such a strong person, so naturally such a strong person is welcome to settle down, and it will not collect the ultimate spar.

It just so happened that Ye Tian was at the ancient level, and he was completely up to standard.

......

After Ye Tian came to the Linggu Capital, he showed his ancient-level strength, and was quickly assigned to a mansion, and in the years that followed, he met some other ancient-level powerhouses, got to know each other, and officially settled in the Linggu Capital.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian mixed into some ancient-level circles and learned a lot of things.

For example, how many Ancient-level powerhouses are there in the Linggu Capital?

It is known that there are six digits!

In addition, there is still a place of ultimate supreme inheritance in the Spirit Ancient Capital, but the ordinary ancient level cannot enter, and all of them are controlled by those six ancient level powerhouses.

Ye Tian felt that it was very reasonable, if the human race occupied such a inheritance place, it would be impossible for outsiders to enter.

Now, the six Immortal-level powerhouses are willing to release some places to enter the Land of Inheritance, which is already very good.

......

After breaking through to an ancient-level powerhouse, Ye Tian's strength was enough to support him to travel all over the Ultimate Land, looking for opportunities such as the Ultimate Breath, so as to comprehend other Ultimate Rules.

Of course.

Many ancient level will major in an ultimate system, elevating an ultimate rule to an extremely high level, so that the ultimate body can be completed and step into the eternal level.

After reaching the Eternal Level, you can slowly comprehend other ultimate rules, which is also the path chosen by many Ancient Level and even Ancient Level Ultimate Realm Masters.

But Ye Tian was not in a hurry, his multiple copy bodies could be cultivated separately without delaying time, and he could completely walk multiple ultimate body paths at the same time.

this day.

Somewhere in the Ultimate Land.

Ye Tian found the most primitive ultimate qi (Zhao's) breath, and then began to comprehend here.

The ultimate aura here was somewhat similar to the Ultimate Way of the Abyssal Star, so he began to comprehend the Abyssal Ultimate Rules.

Time flies.

A long period of time has passed, and although the ultimate rule of the Abyss Star has not been comprehended, it is about to be comprehended.

"'The ultimate aura here is gone, keep looking!'"

After a long period of searching, he once again found an ultimate aura, and after this enlightenment, he successfully comprehended the ultimate rules of the Abyssal Star, allowing the Abyss Ultimate System to break through to the ancient level, and at the same time making the strength of his body stronger.

Comprehending the ultimate rules, the ultimate body is equivalent to breaking through to the realm of Xiaocheng, but if you want to improve to the realm of Dacheng, it is very difficult, at least you have to comprehend hundreds of ultimate rules to achieve this step.

And this is a difficult threshold for many ancient level Ultimate Realm Lords to cross.
